Invitees' Comments:: "Thank You very much for the tickets, we had a great time" Rogers Liquor, Marina California.
"We really appreciate Lorillard thinking us." Shiffert's Wholesale, Visalia, California.
"Thank you so much for the invitations... We had a great time." Mission Trail Oil Company (Rotten Robbie Stores) San Jose California.
"The races were great the Newport Hospitality area was terrific". Coremark, Sacramento, California.
Suggestions/ Recommendations:: Perhaps the tickets could be sent but a little sooner This year the tickets arrived on Thursday and the race was Sunday. This made it difficult to get the tickets to customers on tine.
